headlines.title: Trump seeks payback against Republicans who opposed him in today's primaries
headlines.description: President Donald Trump's revenge tour against dissident Republicans hits Indiana's primaries on Tuesday, as he and allies try to unseat seven Republican state senators who voted last year against a Trump-backed congressional map

headlines.title: Republicans propose $1 billion in taxpayer dollars to secure Trump ballroom
headlines.description: President Donald Trump portrayed the big new ballroom he’s building on White House grounds as a gift to the nation, courtesy of patriotic private donors.

headlines.title: 'Ohio is back': Both parties navigate competitive midterm races in a forgotten battleground
headlines.description: CLEVELAND — Two hard facts hover over this year’s midterm races in Ohio

headlines.title: Two Indiana GOP legislators lose primaries to Trump-backed challengers while another survives
headlines.description: Trump's intervention after losing redistricting battle has shined a national spotlight on what are usually quiet Republican primaries for Indiana state Senate seats.

headlines.title: Vance makes Iowa debut with a midterm message: 'This is not a normal election'
headlines.description: Vice President JD Vance took repeated shots at Democrats in Iowa in a midterm-year effort to boost a vulnerable Republican congressman.

headlines.title: President Trump to pause 'Project Freedom' in Strait of Hormuz
headlines.description: President Trump announced that he will be pausing "Project Freedom," the military mission to escort ships through the Strait of Hormuz. Trump says the effort will be halted due to progress being made with Iran in hopes that a deal can be reached.

headlines.title: Backlash from Democrats over GOP request for taxpayer money for White House ballroom
headlines.description: Democrats blasted a GOP request for taxpayer money for the new White House ballroom. The White House said the public funds will only be used for secure portions of the building, and that the actual ballroom will be paid for by private donations. NBC News’ Gabe Gutierrez reports.

headlines.title: FBI director slams sheriff over Nancy Guthrie case
headlines.description: In a newly released podcast, FBI Director Kash Patel raises criticism about law enforcement coordination in the disappearance of Nancy Guthrie, saying the FBI was kept out of the investigation for four days. NBC News’ Kelly O’Donnell reports.

headlines.title: The front-runners to lead Bernie Sanders' grassroots movement in 2028
headlines.description: The massive grassroots movement that twice rallied behind Bernie Sanders' presidential bids is facing a big question: Who will emerge as its next leader?

headlines.title: Anger and despair among Jewish Britons after spate of attacks
headlines.description: LONDON — Britain in 2026 is a place where Jack Hur doesn’t feel safe wearing his Star of David pendant.

headlines.title: How the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner chaos unfolded
headlines.description: Secret Service faced challenges evacuating President, Vice President, Cabinet officials and Congressional leaders after gunman rushes D.C. gala.

headlines.title: U.S. insists Iran ceasefire not over despite attacks in Strait of Hormuz
headlines.description: The ceasefire in the Middle East was in peril Tuesday after the United States and Iran traded fire and threats over President Donald Trump's new mission to force open the Strait of Hormuz.
